member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Channels.FastechAnalogInputChannel
member.summary: Provides Fastech Ethernet analog input operations.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Channels.FastechAnalogOutputChannel
member.summary: Provides Fastech Ethernet analog output operations.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Channels.FastechDigitalInputChannel
member.summary: Provides Fastech Ethernet digital input operations.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Channels.FastechDigitalOutputChannel
member.summary: Provides Fastech Ethernet digital output operations.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Controllers.FastechEthernetIoController
member.summary: Provides a Fastech Ethernet I/O controller implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Controllers.FastechEthernetIoController.#ctor(Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Controllers.FastechEthernetIoController.#ctor(Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions,Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Fastech Ethernet I/O protocol implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Controllers.FastechEthernetIoController.#ctor(Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions,Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.IFastechEthernetIoTransport,Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Fastech Ethernet I/O protocol implementation.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Controllers.FastechEthernetIoController.Options
member.summary: Gets the Fastech Ethernet I/O options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions
member.summary: Represents Fastech Ethernet I/O connection options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the target host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the target port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.LocalPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the local UDP port. Zero lets Windows choose an ephemeral source port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.TransportType
member.summary: Gets or sets the transport type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.DeviceIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the board, device, or controller index.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the connect timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.ReceiveTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the receive timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry count.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.ExpectedResponseLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected response length. Zero means the transport reads until the first available packet ends.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.Properties
member.summary: Gets provider-specific properties that should be interpreted only by the concrete protocol implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions.ToIoConnectionOptions
member.summary: Converts these options to provider-neutral I/O connection options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoTransportType
member.summary: Represents the Fastech Ethernet I/O transport type.

member.name: F:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoTransportType.Udp
member.summary: UDP transport for Ezi-IO Plus-E protocol communication.

member.name: F:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoTransportType.Tcp
member.summary: TCP transport for custom or future Fastech Ethernet I/O communication.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.FastechPlusE16PointProtocol
member.summary: Provides the Fastech Ezi-IO Plus-E 16-point digital I/O UDP protocol.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.FastechPlusE16PointProtocol.ParseSlaveInfo(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte})
member.summary: Parses a slave information response.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol
member.summary: Defines protocol frame building and parsing for Fastech Ethernet I/O.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.BuildReadDigitalInputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Dreamine.IO.Abstractions.Models.IoPoint})
member.summary: Builds a digital input read request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.ParseDigitalInputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses a digital input read response.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.BuildReadDigitalOutputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Dreamine.IO.Abstractions.Models.IoPoint})
member.summary: Builds a digital output read request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.ParseDigitalOutputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses a digital output read response.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.BuildWriteDigitalOutputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{Dreamine.IO.Abstractions.Models.IoPoint,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Builds a digital output write request.
member.param: The digital output values keyed by point.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.BuildReadAnalogInputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Dreamine.IO.Abstractions.Models.AnalogIoPoint})
member.summary: Builds an analog input read request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.ParseAnalogInputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses an analog input read response.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.BuildReadAnalogOutputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Dreamine.IO.Abstractions.Models.AnalogIoPoint})
member.summary: Builds an analog output read request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.ParseAnalogOutputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses an analog output read response.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.BuildWriteAnalogOutputs(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{Dreamine.IO.Abstractions.Models.AnalogIoPoint,System.Double})
member.summary: Builds an analog output write request.
member.param: The analog output values keyed by point.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.IFastechEthernetIoProtocol.ParseWriteResponse(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte})
member.summary: Parses a write response.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Protocol.UnsupportedFastechEthernetIoProtocol
member.summary: Provides an explicit fail-fast protocol for unsupported or not-yet-verified Fastech Ethernet I/O models.
member.remarks: The default controller uses for the real-hardware-verified Ezi-IO Plus-E 16-point DIO device. Use this implementation only when an application wants a protocol object that satisfies dependency injection while preventing accidental network frames for an unsupported model.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.IFastechEthernetIoTransport
member.summary: Defines transport operations for Fastech Ethernet I/O communication.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.IFastechEthernetIoTransport.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the transport is connected.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.IFastechEthernetIoTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects the transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.IFastechEthernetIoTransport.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disconnects the transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.IFastechEthernetIoTransport.SendAndReceiveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a request frame and receives a response frame.
member.param: The expected response length. Zero reads the first available packet.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.TcpFastechEthernetIoTransport
member.summary: Provides TCP transport for Fastech Ethernet I/O communication.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.TcpFastechEthernetIoTransport.#ctor(Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.UdpFastechEthernetIoTransport
member.summary: Provides UDP transport for Fastech Ezi-IO Plus-E communication.

member.name: M:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.UdpFastechEthernetIoTransport.#ctor(Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Options.FastechEthernetIoOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.UdpFastechEthernetIoTransport.LastRequestFrame
member.summary: Gets the last request frame sent by this transport.

member.name: P:Dreamine.IO.Fastech.Ethernet.Transport.UdpFastechEthernetIoTransport.LastResponseFrame
member.summary: Gets the last response frame received by this transport.
